# Parallel Work Contract

## Rule: DO NOT edit this file without user approval.

Both agents read this file. Changes require explicit user sign-off to prevent contract drift.

## Branch ownership

| Agent      | Branch                    | Root directories Owned          |
|------------|---------------------------|---------------------------------|
| Claude     | `claude/api-surface`      | `backend/api/`, `flutter/`      |
| OpenCode   | `opencode/agent-runtime`  | `backend/agent/`, `backend/provider/`, `backend/tools/` |

## Shared files (coordinate before editing)

- `backend/go.mod` / `backend/go.sum` — both may need to add dependencies
- `backend/cmd/mocode/main.go` — both may need to wire things in
- `CHECKPOINT.md` / `TODO.md` — update your own `progress/` instead during parallel work

## Interface contract

Claude builds the task manager. OpenCode builds the agent runtime. They connect through this interface:

```go
// Package agent exposes the runtime to the API layer.
// File: backend/agent/runner.go

package agent

import "context"

// TaskRequest is what the API layer sends to start an agent session.
type TaskRequest struct {
    ID         string            `json:"id"`
    Prompt     string            `json:"prompt"`
    Provider   string            `json:"provider"`   // "claude", "gemini", "copilot"
    WorkingDir string            `json:"working_dir"`
    Config     map[string]string `json:"config,omitempty"`
}

// EventKind identifies what type of agent event this is.
type EventKind string

const (
    EventText       EventKind = "text"
    EventToolCall   EventKind = "tool_call"
    EventToolResult EventKind = "tool_result"
    EventPlan       EventKind = "plan"
    EventStatus     EventKind = "status"
    EventError      EventKind = "error"
    EventDone       EventKind = "done"
)

// AgentEvent is a single streaming event from the agent runtime.
type AgentEvent struct {
    TaskID   string            `json:"task_id"`
    Kind     EventKind         `json:"kind"`
    Content  string            `json:"content"`
    Metadata map[string]any    `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
}

// Runner is the interface Claude's task manager calls.
// OpenCode implements this by wiring the agent loop.
type Runner interface {
    // Start begins an agent session. Returns a channel that streams events.
    // The channel is closed when the agent finishes or the context is canceled.
    Start(ctx context.Context, req TaskRequest) (<-chan AgentEvent, error)

    // Cancel stops a running agent session by task ID.
    Cancel(taskID string) error

    // Status returns the current state of a task ("running", "completed", "canceled", "failed").
    Status(taskID string) (string, error)
}
```

## File ownership (no overlapping edits)

### Claude owns
- `backend/api/` — all files (server, handlers, messages, middleware, config)
- `backend/api/server_test.go` — backend API tests
- `flutter/` — all Flutter code
- `progress/claude/` — progress tracking

### OpenCode owns
- `backend/agent/` — agent runtime, runner implementation
- `backend/provider/` — LLM provider abstraction (claude, gemini, copilot)
- `backend/tools/` — tool dispatch (file, shell, git)
- `backend/context/` — context management
- `progress/opencode/` — progress tracking

### Merge point
- `backend/cmd/mocode/main.go` — Claude wires API, OpenCode wires agent. Merge on integration branch.

## Convergence checklist

Before merging branches:
1. Both agents update their `PROGRESS.md` to "ready to merge"
2. User reviews both progress files
3. Create integration branch from main
4. Merge Claude's branch first (API layer has no agent dependency — uses stub)
5. Merge OpenCode's branch (swap stub with real Runner implementation)
6. Run `go build ./cmd/mocode` and `go test ./...`
7. Update root `CHECKPOINT.md` and `TODO.md`
